title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Accenture India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Accenture India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Accenture India in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Accenture India:
Accenture India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India!
